creator: topical@gmx.net
text:
(In reply to Jake from comment #1)
Tried to do a 

make static-dist dev-ui

but after compiling got stuck with

fatal: not a git repository (or any of the parent directories): .git

@Jake: Can you tell me, what exactly you did to compile vault manually?

Apart from that: how can this be done automatically? Right now, we have a broken package, which is not a "good thing".
